channel.title: Display Refrigerator on Commercial Cooling Direct
channel.description: Recent content in Display Refrigerator on Commercial Cooling Direct

item.title: Curved Glass Deli Display SS Series
item.description:
• Highly competitive pricing.
  • High-efficiency compressor.
  • Customizable voltage and frequency.
  • Customizable inverter compressor.
  • Customizable components.
  • Customizable dimensions.
  • Customizable materials.
  • Customizable color, branding and logo.
  • Customizable shipping option.
